Description: Primary key — unique identifier for the police employee. Referenced by CaseMaster.PolicePersonID, ArrestSurrender.IOID
FK → District.DistrictID — district the employee is currently posted in
FK → Unit.UnitID — unit/police station the employee is assigned to
FK → Rank.RankID — current rank of the employee
FK → Designation.DesignationID — current designation of the employee
Karnataka Government ID (unique government employee number)
Date of birth of the employee
Blood group of the employee (lookup value)
Flag: whether the employee is physically challenged (1=Yes, 0=No)
Date of appointment to government service
